name: obsidian-ribbon-organizer
description: Group your ribbon and launch commands from a configurable ribbon menu

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.smoke:install: npm run build && mkdir -p dev/vault/.obsidian/plugins/ribbon-organizer && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css dev/vault/.obsidian/plugins/ribbon-organizer/

author: xooooooooox
